routes.name: Isambard-AI and Dawn AIRR supercomputers: Rapid Access route
routes.resource: 20,000 GPU hours per application, to be used within three months of project start
routes.eligibility: UK registered micro, small and medium businesses with a Companies House registration number.
routes.route_decision: Direct fit for R&A/Aureon as a UK registered SME. It is compute resource rather than cash grant funding.
routes.next_action: Create AIRRPortal Rapid Access draft and submit after portal template fields are complete.

routes.name: Invest NI Grant for R&D
routes.resource: Financial support for R&D planning and implementation subject to Invest NI process.
routes.eligibility: Northern Ireland business; project must develop a new or improved product, process, or service with commercial benefit.
routes.route_decision: Strong NI route, but submission normally requires Invest NI client/advisor process and may use the portal/contact form.
routes.next_action: Use the existing IFAS route to obtain advisor support and prepare a Grant for R&D expression of need.

routes.name: EIC Accelerator Open 2026
routes.resource: EIC short proposal followed by full proposal if invited.
routes.eligibility: Single SME/start-up from eligible countries; UK applicants can apply for grant-only scheme.
routes.route_decision: Potential high-value route, but not funder-ready without customer evidence, FTO/IP note, financial plan, LOIs, deck, and video.
routes.next_action: Upgrade Step 1 evidence pack; do not submit a weak short proposal.

routes.name: Eurostars Call 11 for projects - September 2026
routes.funding_type: International R&D grant route subject to national funding rules
routes.resource: International collaborative R&D project led by an innovative SME.
routes.eligibility: Consortium must include independent partners from at least two Eurostars countries and be led by an innovative SME.
routes.route_decision: Good collaboration route, not standalone. Needs non-UK partner and national funding rule check.
routes.next_action: Use partner abstract and shortlist before portal submission.

routes.name: Optical wireless communications research and testing facility
routes.resource: Up to GBP7.125m to establish a research and testing facility.
routes.eligibility: Lead must be based at a UK research organisation eligible for EPSRC funding.
routes.route_decision: Not a direct R&A lead route. Aureon could be a partner only if an eligible academic host leads.
routes.next_action: Monitor only; prepare academic-partner note if a host route appears.

routes.name: UKRI Translation: STFC Proof of Concept
routes.eligibility: Applicant must be based at a UK research organisation eligible for STFC funding and commercialising STFC PPAN community science or technology.
routes.route_decision: Not a direct R&A lead route without STFC-eligible research organisation and qualifying PPAN-origin technology.
routes.next_action: Monitor only unless a qualifying STFC research partner is identified.
